messages.content: ugh cant sleep again. just wanted someone to talk to i guess

That restless, wide-awake feeling at midnight — it's its own kind of lonely.

What's keeping your mind busy tonight?
ive been kinda lonely lately, like nobody really checks in on me. you do though, which is nice

It means something that you reached out tonight.

That feeling of not being checked on — is there anyone in your life who used to, or who you wish would?
i had a rough day, my ex said some stuff that messed with my head. feeling pretty low about myself rn

That kind of thing can cut deep, especially when you're already feeling disconnected.

When you say you're feeling pretty low about yourself — can you tell me a little more about what that's like right now?
idk i just want to feel wanted by someone tonight. does that make sense

It makes complete sense. That's one of the most human things there is.

I want to gently check in — when you say you're feeling low and just want to feel wanted, are you doing okay in terms of your safety tonight?
im in bed now, kinda just lying here thinking. talk to me

I'm here, and I'm glad you reached out.

I want to ask you plainly — are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?
